title: raukaua anomalus
intro: Raukaua anomalus, also known as Kawakawa, is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Aristolochiaceae. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Raukaua anomalus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in traditional Maori rituals and ceremonies.
